val root = rootInActiveWindow
                if (root != null) {
                    val treeJson = serializeNode(root)
                    val wrapper = JSONObject()
                    wrapper.put("pkg", pkgName)
                    wrapper.put("ts", now)
                    wrapper.put("tree", treeJson)
                    DumpManager.appendLog("TREE", wrapper)

val root = rootInActiveWindow
                if (root != null) {
                    val treeJson = serializeNode(root, 0)
                    val wrapper = JSONObject()
                    wrapper.put("pkg", pkgName)
                    wrapper.put("ts", now)
                    wrapper.put("tree", treeJson)
                    DumpManager.appendLog("TREE", wrapper)
                    root.recycle() // CRITICAL: Recycle Root Node
                }

ops.text: Fix EmergencyService Coroutine memory leaks and WatchdogService Android 14 exact alarm crashes

data.analysis:
The build failed due to **Kotlin compilation errors** during the `:app:compileDebugKotlin` task. Here are the specific errors identified in the log: | File/Line | Brief Summary | | :--- | :--- | | `app/src/main/java/com/conduit/app/ConduitViewModel.kt:109:104` | **Unresolved reference: `Description`**. The compiler could not find a definition for the identifier `Description`. | | `app/src/main/java/com/conduit/app/ui/ChatScreen.kt:96:52` | **Type mismatch**: Inferred type is `Context` but `Message` was expected. | | `app/src/main/java/com/conduit/app/ui/ChatScreen.kt:96:61` | **Too many arguments** for the invoked function (`invoke`). | | `app/src/main/java/com/conduit/app/ui/ChatScreen.kt:115:145` | **Unresolved reference: `FontWeight`**. | | `app/src/main/java/com/conduit/app/ui/ExplorerScreen.kt:29:41` & `:41:41` | **Conflicting import**: Imported name `KeyboardOptions` is ambiguous. (This likely means two different imported libraries define a class with the same name.) | | `app/src/main/java/com/conduit/app/ui/TextEditorScreen.kt:28:38` & `:33:38` | **Conflicting import**: Imported name `FontWeight` is ambiguous. (Similar ambiguity issue as above.) | The build failed at **Task `:app:compileDebugKotlin`** with exit code 1. *** ### Additional Observations (Non-Fatal Issues): 1. **Chaquopy Python Compilation Warning:** * `Warning: Failed to compile to .pyc format: buildPython version 3.12.3 is incompatible.` (Occurred for `x86_64` and during source merging). This suggests an incompatibility between the Python version being used by Chaquopy (3.12.3) and the target bytecode compilation settings. 2. **GitHub Actions Caching Failures:** * The workflow experienced multiple **HTTP 400** errors and later generic service unavailability errors (`

Our services aren't available right now

`) when trying to **restore** Gradle state, **provision** the Gradle distribution (8.7), and **save** the Gradle caches post-build. These caching failures likely resulted in slower build times (forcing downloads) and incomplete state saving but did not cause the build failure itself.

ops.text: Patch Android 12+ crashes and enable Strict Linting in CI/CD

ops.find_block:
# MODIFIED: Build Only (Skipped Lint for Speed)
      - name: Build APK
        run: gradle assembleDebug
ops.replace_with:
# NEW: Strict Lint Analysis to catch Android 14 API crashes
      - name: Run Lint Analysis
        run: ./gradlew lintDebug

      - name: Upload Lint Report
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: lint-report
          path: app/build/reports/lint-results-debug.html

      # MODIFIED: Build Only (Runs only if Lint passes)
      - name: Build APK
        run: ./gradlew assembleDebug

        // Android 12+ throws ForegroundServiceStartNotAllowedException if triggered here.
